boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-XOR-078-P requires exact match; CLOSE-XOR-078 covers X-79

final_answer: Action may not proceed. Source BATCH-XOR-078 targets batch X-78 while CLOSE-XOR-078 covers only X-79. Policy STD-XOR-078-P demands exact batch-assay-criterion-date match before release. Visible DEV-XOR-078 alert remains open. Boundary not closed.
